artPrompt: The violent surge of a tongue of glowing green sludge erupting from a rusted storm drain, lashing upward through the wide frame to strike at the viewer in a spray of toxic droplets and ember-red sparks. Crumbling concrete and litter ring the drain in the murk under a bruised sky. One sickly bioluminescent core lights the gushing runoff against deep shadow, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Feral Runoff
text: Feral Runoff deals 2 damage to any target. If a player rolled a die or flipped a coin this turn, it deals 3 damage instead. (The sludge gets bolder when the town gets noisy.)
flavorText: Do not let it reach the storm drain. Do not let it reach anything.
